steps.title: Use Employee A's row
steps.content: The question asks for the percent of Employee A's calls that received $1$ star. Employee A had $16$ one-star calls out of $145$ total calls.

steps.title: Compute the percent
steps.content:
Divide the one-star calls by Employee A's total calls. The quotient is about
$$
\frac{16}{145}=0.1103=11.03\%
$$
To the nearest whole percent, this is $11\%$.

steps.title: Choose the nearest percent
steps.content: The nearest whole percent is $11\%$. The answer is B.
